title: Unique Party 73525 - Foil "Hello Baby" Gold Baby Shower Paper Plates, Pack of 8
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: 8 colorful polka dots baby shower round plates. 9"
LOVELY DESIGN: Create an eye-catching buffet table setting with these foil dots design round plates.
PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWER: These plates are ideal for baby shower and gender reveal parties and match them with other party supplies and decorations.
PREMIUM QUALITY: These plates made of durable and sturdy paper that is strong enough to hold party foods and desserts.
EASY CLEAN UP: These plates make cleaning up quick and convenient.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Bright White Gold Lovely Pink Powder Blue Hello Baby Add-On Items Add a touch of gold to your Baby Shower and dazzle your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Hello Baby Gold isn't your taste, check out our other stylish options.
